title: India’s New Job Map: Why Tier-2 Cities Are Hiring Faster Than Metros.
description: India’s fastest job growth isn’t happening in Bengaluru or Mumbai — it’s happening in Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities.From Jaipur’s fintech wave to Vizag’s $15B Google AI Hub, these cities are becoming serious career hubs in tech, manufacturing, AI, and cloud engineering.If you’re entering the job market in 2025–26, this shift will shape your future.Follow Full Disclosure for more deep-dive explainers on careers, tech, and the future of work.
